# Signal to System
## About
A technical publication by Nick Miethe covering AI agents, agentic SDLC, architecture, platform engineering, and technical leadership.

## Content Structure
- /essays/ - Long-form essays and field notes
- /series/ - Multi-post series on major themes
- /projects/ - Portfolio artifacts and projects
- /tags/ - Tag-based content discovery
- /topics/ - Topic hub pages

## Key Topics
- AI Agents and Agentic SDLC
- Technical Leadership and CTO Patterns
- Architecture and Platform Engineering
- Agent-Ready Repository Design
- Context Engineering

## Feeds
- RSS: /rss.xml
- Sitemap: /sitemap-index.xml
- Search Index: /search.json

## Author
Nick Miethe - Technical Executive, Architect, Builder
